张尘降生北冥道域，父亲是荒古张家上任神子，母亲曾是天骄榜妖孽。
开局觉醒鸿蒙不灭体，被封家族神子！
之后……
签到忘生刀法，一刀落轮回忘生！
签到天命心经，算尽世间一切祸福！
签到草字剑诀，一根草，也能斩灭天穹！
签到一念通天，一念为魔，一念为神！
签到斩天拔剑术，剑道锋芒压万古！
签到修为灌顶，修为给我一路狂飙！
……
入鲲鹏墟，碾压亿万天骄，荣登天骄榜榜首，一眼望去，天骄尽低眉。
出混沌，镇鸿蒙，世间无量，唯我永恒无敌！

unt":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":96477,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":37110},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1696499055,"author_reply_time":1696499064,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7329042071507141438","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"签到系统类无敌流，故事框架厚重，中千世界、大千世界、诸天万界、混沌、鸿蒙的发展逻辑清晰，剧情推进流畅，家族感情人物设定合理，五星推荐。进入鸿蒙世界及圣族内战部分处理的有些简单，明明可以展开的剧情却收敛处理，没有展现鸿蒙及其诞生的种族因果，再就是结尾有些着急，张无殇的诸天签到系统为什么会出现？到底是什么样的存在产生的它？期待作者更好的作品！","text_exts":[{"e":4,"s":0,"text":"签到系统","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AD%BE%E5%88%B0%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399372417ED6689%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227329042071507141438%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227234382180724509729%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AD%BE%E5%88%B0%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":30,"s":26,"text":"诸天万界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%AF%B8%E5%A4%A9%E4%B8%87%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399372417ED6689%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227329042071507141438%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227234382180724509729%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%AF%B8%E5%A4%A9%E4%B8%87%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706427984,"group_id":"7234382180724509729","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"高高山顶立，深深海底行。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0AJ0lB
